heading: Forty years or more: Army officers
label: 7324 Forty years or more: Army officers
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)3924(a)3924(b)10:942 (as applicable to commissioned officers).10:942 (less applicability to commissioned officers).(last 21 words of 3d proviso under “Pay Department”), .June 30, 1882, ch. 25422 Stat. 118In subsection (a), the words “except as provided in ” are inserted, since, under that revised section, when board proceedings are pending against a commissioned officer, his right to retire under this revised section, which is otherwise absolute, is discretionary with the Secretary under that revised section.section 3786 of this titleIn subsections (a) and (b), the words “or volunteer service, or both” are omitted as obsolete in accordance with an opinion of the Attorney General, 22 Ops. Atty. Gen. 199, , holding that such words refer to volunteer service in the Civil War. The words “upon his request” are substituted for the words “if he make application therefor to the President”.August 30, 1898In subsection (b), the applicability of 10:942 to warrant officers is based on an opinion of the Judge Advocate General of the Army (JAGA 1950/6951, 4 Jan. 1951), which holds that 10:594 (less provisos) makes 10:942 applicable to warrant officers.

Amendments2018—, renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–232, § 808(b)(12)section 3924 of this titleSubsec. (a). , substituted “section 7326” for “section 3926”.Pub. L. 115–232, § 809(a)Subsec. (b). , substituted “section 7326(a)” for “section 3926(a)”.Pub. L. 115–232, § 809(a)1980—Subsec. (a). substituted “1186” for “3786”.Pub. L. 96–513

children.label: a
children.text: Except as provided in , a commissioned officer of the Army who has at least 40 years of service computed under shall be retired upon his request.section 1186 of this titlesection 7326 of this title

children.label: b
children.text: Any warrant officer of the Army who has at least 40 years of service computed under shall be retired upon his request.section 7326(a) of this title
